features.name: Public API Validation
features.description: Invalid API inputs and unsupported operations fail deterministically without corrupting state.

test_cases.test_description: Validates library open/close and global TLS provider parameter validation.
Validates configuration inputs including ALPN lengths and settings.
Validates stream API calls before and after connection setup.

features.name: Registration and Configuration Lifecycle
features.description: Applications can open/close registrations, create configurations, and load credentials.

test_cases.test_description: Covers registration open and close behavior.
Covers valid TLS credential configuration variants.

features.name: Listener Binding and ALPN Routing
features.description: Listeners bind addresses, advertise ALPNs, and reject conflicting ALPN bindings.

test_cases.test_description: Ensures ALPN conflicts are rejected.
Starts listeners on explicit IPv4/IPv6 addresses.

features.name: Connection Creation, Binding, and Parameters
features.description: Connections expose lifecycle, binding, address, statistics, scheduling, datagram, DSCP, and TLS parameters.

test_cases.test_description: Creates a client connection handle.
Validates connection parameter get/set behavior.

features.name: Handshake, ALPN, Certificates, and Resumption
features.description: Connections complete or fail handshakes correctly across ALPN, certificate, retry, and resumption scenarios.

test_cases.test_description: Covers IPv4/IPv6 handshakes with retry, ALPN, grease, and client initial variants.
Covers resumption ticket use.
Validates TLS handshake behavior.

features.name: QUIC Version Negotiation
features.description: Version settings and version negotiation extension behavior are honored.

test_cases.test_description: Exercises version negotiation scenarios.
Encodes and decodes version negotiation extension information.

features.name: Stream Data Transfer and Flow Control
features.description: Reliable streams transfer data across stream directions, scheduling modes, 0-RTT, and shutdown cases.

test_cases.test_description: Exercises multi-connection and multi-stream ping-style data transfer.
Validates bidirectional stream flow-control block/unblock behavior.

features.name: Stream Events and Ownership
features.description: Connection and stream event sequences are delivered in valid order and peer-created objects are accepted by callback.

test_cases.test_description: Validates connection event sequences.
Validates stream event sequences.
Validates ownership behavior across connection and stream close.

features.name: Receive Buffer Modes
features.description: Receive buffers correctly handle modes, gaps, drains, app-owned buffers, and reset.

test_cases.test_description: Validates receiving with gaps across modes.
Validates app-owned buffer exhaustion handling.

features.name: Datagram Negotiation and Delivery
features.description: Datagrams are sent, received, or canceled according to negotiated capability.

test_cases.test_description: Validates datagram negotiation enabled and disabled cases.
Validates datagram send and receive.

features.name: QUIC Frame and VarInt Encoding
features.description: QUIC frame and varint encoding/decoding accepts valid data and rejects malformed data.

test_cases.test_description: Round-trips ACK frames.
Randomized varint encode/decode round trip.

features.name: Packet Number Ranges and ACK Tracking
features.description: Range and ACK tracking logic merges, searches, limits, and detects reordering.

test_cases.test_description: Merges separated adjacent values into one range.
Checks reordering threshold detection.

features.name: Congestion Control and Pacing
features.description: CUBIC and BBR respond to ACK/loss/ECN, recovery, pacing, app-limited, and statistics events.

test_cases.test_description: Validates CUBIC window reduction on loss.
Validates BBR startup to drain transition.

features.name: Platform Datapath and Address Utilities
features.description: Platform datapath supports UDP/TCP, address parsing, DSCP/ECN, socket sharing, and event queues.

test_cases.test_description: Validates UDP data transfer over IPv4/IPv6.
Validates address parsing behavior.

features.name: TLS and Cryptographic Primitives
features.description: TLS and crypto satisfy known vectors, handshake, certificate, cipher, resumption, and key-update behavior.

test_cases.test_description: Validates QUIC v1 initial key derivation and packet protection vector.
Validates TLS resumption.

features.name: Diagnostics, Statistics, and Storage
features.description: Diagnostics expose counters, statistics, network events, persistent settings, metadata, and compatible sizes.

test_cases.test_description: Validates performance counter query.
Validates settings loaded from storage.
